title: OEIS A327094: Smallest Polyomino Containing All Free n-ominoes -- Solver code, data, and figures
description: SAT solver (PySAT/CaDiCaL) for OEIS A327094. Matches all 9 known terms a(0) through a(8) proved by prior authors. Proves a(9) = 26 (SAT at k=26, UNSAT at k=25). Includes solver code (Python/PySAT), solution data (JSON), solver run log, and colored figure PDF.
